title: verbascum × clinantherum
intro: Verbascum × clinantherum is a hybrid plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae), resulting from the cross between Verbascum thapsus and Clinantheae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × clinantherum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in ointments and salves to harness its medicinal benefits.
